title: Canva for Nonprofits
description: Canva for Nonprofits provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, fundraising tools, communications tools, productivity tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Canva premium design and collaboration features for eligible nonprofit teams under current program limits.
